hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(generate_pcb/|release_jlcpcb/|footprints|jlcpcb_export|\.kicad_pcb)'; then echo '\n>>> PCB/PCBA file modified — remember to run DFA verification: python3 scripts/verify_dfa.py'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(generate_pcb/|release_jlcpcb/|footprints|jlcpcb_export|\.kicad_pcb)'; then echo '\n>>> PCB/PCBA file modified — remember to run DFA verification: python3 scripts/verify_dfa.py'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(generate_pcb|verify_dfm|release)'; then echo '\n>>> PCB pipeline command detected — remember to run DFA verification: python3 scripts/verify_dfa.py'; fi
